sources.result: Live primary-source search returned a high volume of generated bounty-board, security, spam/referral, or stale listings. Three credible/recent issue surfaces were individually refreshed; none qualified.

Open, created 2026-07-21T02:23:38Z and updated 17:17:19Z. Exact stated reward is $1,500, with payout after all three stages; a Tenstorrent contributor states it is subject to the Bounty Program Terms and local tax requirements. The repo is active, public, permits forks/PRs, and its CONTRIBUTING.md accepts external PRs. Rejected: at 14:36:17Z a maintainer/contributor assigned it to sreeshanth-soma; a title-matching PR #50635 was opened at 17:20:56Z and closed at 18:21:32Z; the issue also has an external implementation comment. In addition, all-stage ModernBERT hardware bring-up/optimization is not session-sized.

Open, created 2026-07-21T04:51:13Z and updated 16:54:19Z; zero matching PRs and one member comment. Rejected as security/bug-bounty work rather than a fixed-scope code bounty, with payment/eligibility unverified. The member explicitly says the reported dashboard is not built from the repo and that whether findings count remains unsettled.

Open issue containing a prior participant's completed content submission and explicitly linking underlying report #100 and ready fix #101. Rejected: already addressed by another participant and is not a new independent task.

Live read-only `taskmarket task list --mode bounty --limit 100`, followed by `taskmarket task get` and mode-relevant `taskmarket task submissions` for every one of the eight open bounty-mode tasks. Bounty mode has submissions as its applicable competition route; no stake is required, each has a visible escrow transaction, platform fee is 7.5%, and no pitch/proof/bid route applies. Current submission attempts by task were: b572…ab1a=9, feb9…6613=131, cb67…cf0e=146, 5787…d54a=202, 9989…93c8=50, 1002…59f7=561, d496…1717d0=509, 50d1…5448=310. All entries above 10 attempts were rejected before qualification because their unique-participant count cannot be <=10. The sole lower-count entry (b572…ab1a) has 9 visible submissions from 6 unique worker addresses, expiry 2026-07-23T17:01:34.245Z, gross/net 0.15/0.13875 USDC, but requires a real Base-mainnet x402 EIP-3009 payment/signature of about 0.001 USDC. It is therefore not free or safe to start and was rejected.

rejected.reason: Already maintainer-assigned and has a matching prior closed PR; scope requires complete three-stage hardware model bring-up and performance optimization.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
